description_long: This is a large, wedge-shaped school building with a distinctive triangular footprint and a prominent red-tiled hip roof. The structure features multiple stories with rows of evenly spaced windows and white exterior walls, giving it a formal and institutional appearance. The main entrance is located at the wider end of the triangle, marked by a protruding section with a gabled roof. The building's long sides are lined with covered walkways supported by columns, providing sheltered access along the perimeter. The roof overhangs the walls, adding architectural interest and shade. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern influences, suitable for a sizable educational institution in an urban setting.
description: A large, triangular school building with a red-tiled roof, white walls, and columned walkways. The main entrance is at the wide end, and the structure features multiple stories and a formal, institutional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a gabled roof and the wide end of the triangular building.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the long facade, rows of windows, and the extended red-tiled roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the narrow end of the triangle and the uniform window arrangement along the back.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, but from the other side, showing the length and columned walkways.
